sutta: once the exalted 1 was staying at alabi at agalava near the shrine there then he addressed the monk saying all the true monks that hathaka of alavi is endowed with 7 marvelous and wonderful qualities with what 7 monks hathaka of alabi has faith is virtuous is conscientious fears blame is a great listener is charitable and wise holy true monks that hataka is so endowed thus broke the exalted 1 and arising from his seat the welfare entered the dwelling then among went to hataka so that the exalted 1 had said and hakka said i trust there were no white robe laymen present no indeed friend there were none such there it is well sir then after he returned from his arms round the monk went and told the exalted 1 all that had happened and the exalted 1 said well done well done monk the clansman is modest he does not wish his good qualities to be known to others or the true man that hathaka of alavi is endowed with this eighth wonderful and marvelous quality namely modesty [Music] and the next utah
